title: urostigma terebratum
intro: Urostigma terebratum, also known as the "tree sterculia" or "sterculia tree", is a type of plant species belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic practices, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Urostigma terebratum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and powdered extracts, which are often used to make traditional medicine formulations.
